{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Jan's family
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Doctor Cryce]] has no respect for [[Jan's family]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c9">''The Knight'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
